ddls:
CREATE TABLE "form_layouts" (
  "form_key" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the form layout */,
  "layout_name" TEXT /* Name of the layout */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layout's purpose */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department linked to this form layout */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the form layout is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the form layout */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the form layout was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the form layout */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the form layout was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_uploads" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file upload */,
  "form_key" TEXT /* Reference to the form layout used for this file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the file was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the file was last updated */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the file belongs to */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file is private (sensitive) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorization and searching */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure file integrity */,
  "upload_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_uploads_form_key FOREIGN KEY ("form_key") REFERENCES form_layouts ("form_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Device and browser used for the access */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES file_uploads ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "file_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file type is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the file type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the file type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "form_column" TEXT /* Reference to the form column that this rule applies to */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., required, size limit) */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message to display when validation fails */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the validation rule is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form submission */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file linked to the submission */,
  "submit_date" TEXT /* Date the form was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the submission (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the form */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the submission belongs to */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments added by the user when submitting the form */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the form was approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the form */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the form was not approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_submissions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES file_uploads ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
